query: SELECT yearMonth, SUM(CAST(kgInvoiced AS DECIMAL(14,2))) as totalKg, COUNT(*) as totalRows, COUNT(DISTINCT clientCodeSAP) as clients FROM invoices WHERE yearMonth LIKE '2026.02%' OR yearMonth LIKE '2025.02%' GROUP BY yearMonth ORDER BY yearMonth
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2ph4pv6JpSHUTGy.c27c69ec344c --database 6KRpzbn8qi3gczW3Bt9Xb7 --execute SELECT yearMonth, SUM(CAST(kgInvoiced AS DECIMAL(14,2))) as totalKg, COUNT(*) as totalRows, COUNT(DISTINCT clientCodeSAP) as clients FROM invoices WHERE yearMonth LIKE '2026.02%' OR yearMonth LIKE '2025.02%' GROUP BY yearMonth ORDER BY yearMonth
